_comment: CI catalog. Downloads BOTH the host app (aap-core aaphostsample, which embeds the JS controller) and the MDA plugin, all from GitHub Actions artifacts by commit. No building, no --host-apk needed. PREREQUISITES: (1) the aap-core entry must point to a green commit whose aaphostsample bundles the current js-controller (connect step + single-thread fix) — replace the placeholder below; (2) a PAT secret with artifact-read access to both repos (see .github/workflows/integration-tests.yml).
name: mda-ci

entries._note: Green aap-core commit whose aaphostsample bundles the current js-controller.
